hooks.description: 会话启动时清理状态并注入强制执行清单
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" session-start

hooks.description: 阻止修改 linter/formatter/tsconfig 配置文件
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" config-protection

hooks.description: 首次编辑文件前检查是否已 Read 过
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" gateguard

hooks.description: 代码修改后注入 code-reviewer 强制提醒
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" review-reminder

hooks.description: 记录已 Read 的文件供 GateGuard 检查
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" gateguard
d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" review-tracker

hooks.description: 上下文压缩前保存工作状态快照
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" pre-compact

hooks.description: 回复结束时检查 console.log 残留和 review 调用
hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" ] && [ "$d" != "/" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.claude/hooks/run.js" stop-quality-gate
